title: RTX 5090 Price Soars to $3,695 on Newegg - Nearly 2X MSRP with Further Increases Expected
text:
GPU Pricing and Market Analysis - RTX 5090 Premium Pricing at Newegg.

Current RTX 5090 Pricing: The RTX 5090 Founder's Edition is currently listed at $3,695 on Newegg, representing a significant markup from its original MSRP. The article notes that the GPU is going for $3695 on Newegg, nearly double its launch price last year.

Price Increases: Original MSRP: $2,000. Current markup: $1,695 above launch price. Official Nvidia pricing range: $2,500 to $3,719 for the liquid-cooled version.

Expected Future Prices: According to the report, further substantial increases are anticipated. The article states that RTX 5090's price to $5000 is expected as manufacturing costs rise. This projection is attributed to a forecasted 80% increase in manufacturing expenses when memory contracts with chipmakers are renewed.

Contributing Factors: Rising memory prices and AI-driven demand are driving these escalations. The publication indicates that GPU manufacturers will face pressure to adjust official pricing this year to offset increased component costs.
